title: Generation v1alpha1
description: Maps the Desired Graph to native artifacts in one immutable runtime (docs/architecture/README.md §5.4, Generation Graph, and §8, Runtime and State Layout: ~/.local/state/omca/worktrees/<worktree-id>/generations/<generation-id>/). A generation is a build output, never a desired-state source (docs/ontology/README.md §1.1, runtime_generation).

invocation.description: Additive v1alpha1 field (issue #18, PR-14): free-text description of what triggered this generation to be compiled, e.g. 'omca run codex'. Optional; a bootstrap generation (PR-09) always omits it.

parent.description: Previous generation ID this one supersedes, or null for the bootstrap generation.

knowledgePacks.description: docs/knowledge/README.md §11: every generation stores the Pack itself or a durable content-addressed copy.

hosts.description: hostId -> per-host compiled artifact tree, each edge carrying Adapter ID, mapping relation, and ownership (docs/architecture/README.md §5.4).

status.description: Not a closed protocol-wide enum: pending/current/superseded/rolledback are Reconciler/Ledger states (docs/architecture/README.md §9 Reconciler, §4 Ledger), tracked here for convenience only.

sources.description: Additive v1alpha1 field (issue #13, PR-09): every observed source a compiler included or excluded when building this generation, and why (docs/architecture/runtime.md §12: 'native exclusions are explained rather than hidden'). A capabilityGap:true entry may omit source/scope (a class-level gap, not tied to one discovered path) but must carry a non-empty trackingIssue -- capability-gap shipping is allowed, hiding is not.

host.description: Additive v1alpha1 field (issue #19, PR-15): which host this entry's decision belongs to, for a Generation whose spec.hosts names more than one host. Empty for a genuinely host-neutral entry.

trackingIssue.description: Required and non-empty when capabilityGap is true (capability-gap shipping is allowed, hiding is not).

ontologyVersion.description: Additive v1alpha1 field (issue #18, PR-14): the docs/ontology/README.md vocabulary revision this generation's Concept/Scope/Intent values were compiled under (internal/domain.CurrentOntologyVersion).

sourceDigest.description: Additive v1alpha1 field (issue #18, PR-14): canonical digest over spec.sources, the 'source... digest' half of docs/architecture/runtime.md §5.3's 'source and desired-state digests' pending-manifest line.

desiredState.description: Additive v1alpha1 field (issue #18, PR-14): names the exact Profile/Activation/Exception documents desiredGraphDigest was computed from -- §5.3's 'selected Profiles and Activation'. Nil/omitted on a bootstrap generation (PR-09), which has no real Desired Graph.

diff.description: Reserved for §5.3's 'native/current/pending diff' line. Always omitted in this PR (issue #18, PR-14) -- a real diff requires the Activation transaction, PR-15 scope.

riskConfirmations.description: Reserved for §5.3's 'risk confirmations' line. Always empty in this PR (issue #18, PR-14) -- no risk-confirmation workflow exists yet to source real values from.

expectedEvidence.description: Reserved for §5.3's 'expected evidence and guarantee' line. Always empty in this PR (issue #18, PR-14) -- a real expectation needs the Verify step and its evidence taxonomy, PR-22 scope.
